summary: Recent updates to the OpenGL and GL context handling in Firefox aim to improve compatibility and performance, particularly with EGL (the windowing system for OpenGL). Notably, **_the removal of cross-process SurfaceTexture syncing_** simplifies how video textures are managed, enhancing stability and efficiency. Additional changes allow for better integration of iOS surfaces when running ANGLE (a compatibility layer that translates OpenGL ES calls to native graphics APIs), which contributes to smoother rendering on Apple devices. Fixes to various bugs improve the reliability of graphics processing, ensuring a better experience for users viewing web content that relies on advanced graphics features.
